name: PER_INTG_INBOUND_DATA
description: Table to store  inbound xml data received from partners and track the progress of the data in.

columns.Name: INBOUND_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PARTNER_ID
columns.Comments: This stores Partner id and is referenced to Topology manger application id from ASK tables

columns.Name: INBOUND_DATA_CACHE
columns.Comments: Inbound XML coming from partners

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: status of the xml file to store various stages of the inbound data .

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This is the stae of the entire composite

columns.Name: PARTNER_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the application in ASK topology table correspond to PARTNER ID stored in this table

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Integration Message Identifier one

columns.Name: PAYLOAD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Payload Type

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Ess Request Id

columns.Name: COMPOSITE_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: BPEL Composite instance id from the Enterprise Manager SOA server.

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: System generated error code , this is not the data validation but mostly stores infrastructure errors

columns.Name: ERROR_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the errors

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: INTEGRATION_MESSAGE_ID2
columns.Comments: Integration Message Identifier Two
